generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance MotorActuationComponent : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Converts desired speed commands into motor voltage commands via Vedder Electronic Speed Controller. Interfaces with Physical Twin Entity and receives commands from Actuation Functional Entity."
]

instance SteeringServoActuationComponent : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controls steering angle via servo mechanism integrated into lower-level chassis. Interfaces with Physical Twin Entity and receives commands from Actuation Functional Entity."
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Provides 3D point cloud data for object detection and tracking at 1/10-scale vehicle resolution."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance IntelRealSenseD435iCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Captures RGB-D data for environmental perception using Intel RealSense D435i depth camera."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CameraRGBDDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Monitors ego vehicle speed and steering angle via onboard sensors."
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Transmits raw LiDAR point clouds from Hokuyo UST-10LX to Data Collection Functional Entity via ROS2 message format."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance CameraRGBDDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Transmits RGB-D camera feeds from Intel RealSense D435i to Data Collection Functional Entity via ROS2 message format."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelRealSenseD435iCamera
]

instance VehicleStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Transmits ego vehicle state (speed, steering angle) to Data Collection Functional Entity via ROS2 message format."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor
]

instance ProcessedObjectTracksDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Transmits structured object tracks (IDs, positions, velocities) from PointCloudClusteringAndTrackingComponent to Digital Twin Entity."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PointCloudClusteringAndTrackingComponent
]

instance EmergencyBrakingCommandTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Transmits event-based emergency braking commands from User Entity to Controlling Functional Entity via Wi-Fi."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ControlPanelComponent
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance DBSCANClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Implements DBSCAN clustering algorithm for LiDAR point cloud segmentation in Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking component."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudProcessingEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Implements Kalman filtering for object tracking and state estimation in Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking component."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudProcessingEnabler
]

instance ACCAlgorithmModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Implements ISO 15622 Performance Class I Adaptive Cruise Control algorithm for speed control based on lead vehicle distance."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlEnabler
]

instance ActuationConversionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Converts desired speed to motor voltage commands via PID-like control in Actuation Functional Entity."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ActuationControlEnabler
]

instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw 3D point cloud data from Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR processed for object detection."
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudProcessingEnabler
]

instance CameraRGBDData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "RGB-D data from Intel RealSense D435i used for environmental perception and fusion with LiDAR tracks."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CameraRGBDDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RGBDFusionEnabler
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Ego vehicle state data including speed and steering angle for real-time monitoring and control."
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataMonitoringEnabler
]

instance ProcessedObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured object tracks with IDs, positions, and velocities generated from DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering."
    DTDFVocab:fromData ProcessedObjectTracksDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ObjectTrackingService
]

instance TimeSeriesDatabaseData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Timeseries data (vehicle state, object tracks) stored in external SQL database for reporting and analysis."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReportingEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance PointCloudProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enables processing of LiDAR point clouds using DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering in Physical Twin Entity."
    DTDFVocab:enables ObjectTrackingService
]

instance RGBDFusionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enables fusion of RGB-D camera data with LiDAR tracks for augmented environmental perception."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ACCControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enables Adaptive Cruise Control logic implementation (ISO 15622 Performance Class I) and computation offloading to external systems."
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance ActuationControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enables conversion of desired speed commands to motor voltage via PID-like control in Actuation Functional Entity."
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance DataMonitoringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enables real-time visualization of ego vehicle state, object tracks, and projected driving path."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ReportingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enables generation of human-readable timeseries reports from SQL database for post-analysis."
    DTDFVocab:enables ReportingService
]

instance DataTranslationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enables serialization and translation of data between Physical Twin and Digital Twin Entities using ROS2 message formats."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ROS2MiddlewareEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enables modular communication between software components across Physical Twin, Digital Twin, and User Entities."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance MATLABSimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enables complex simulations (point cloud processing) and offline analysis for algorithm development."
    DTDFVocab:enables CyberPhysicalExperimentationService
]

// C6: Services
instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides real-time visualization of ego vehicle state, object tracks, and projected driving path via 3D Visualization UI."
    DTDFVocab:provides EgoVehicleStateInsight, ObjectTracksInsight, DrivingPathInsight
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enables remote enable/disable of ACC, speed adjustment, and emergency braking via Control Panel."
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCStateAction, SpeedAdjustmentAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance ObjectTrackingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Processes LiDAR point clouds and camera data to generate and maintain object tracks using DBSCAN and Kalman filtering."
    DTDFVocab:provides ProcessedObjectTracksInsight
]

instance ReportingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates timeseries reports from SQL database for post-analysis of system performance and anomaly detection."
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemPerformanceReportInsight, AnomalyDetectionReportInsight
]

instance CyberPhysicalExperimentationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrates MATLAB/Simulink for complex simulations and ROS2 for modular testing of autonomy components."
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationValidationInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance EgoVehicleStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of ego vehicle speed and steering angle for operator awareness."
]

instance ObjectTracksInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of detected objects with IDs, positions, and velocities in 3D space."
]

instance DrivingPathInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Projection of current and planned driving path based on object tracks and ACC logic."
]

instance ProcessedObjectTracksInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Structured object tracks data (IDs, positions, velocities) for downstream processing and control."
]

instance SystemPerformanceReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Generated timeseries report of vehicle performance metrics for post-analysis."
]

instance AnomalyDetectionReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Automated detection and reporting of system anomalies during operation."
]

instance SimulationValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation results from MATLAB/Simulink simulations and ROS2-based testing."
]

instance ACCStateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote enable/disable of Adaptive Cruise Control functionality."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SpeedAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote adjustment of desired speed parameter for ACC."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Trigger emergency braking based on system alerts or user commands."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C1: Components (Physical Twin Entity)
instance PointCloudClusteringAndTrackingComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Implements DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering for object detection and tracking from LiDAR point clouds."
    base:isContainedIn PhysicalTwinEntity
]

instance DataPreProcessingComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Pre-processes raw sensor data (LiDAR, camera, vehicle state) before transmission to Digital Twin Entity."
    base:isContainedIn PhysicalTwinEntity
]

instance ActuationFunctionalEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Converts high-level commands to low-level motor/steering actuation commands for physical vehicle control."
    base:isContainedIn PhysicalTwinEntity
]

// C1: Components (Digital Twin Entity)
instance DataCollectionFunctionalEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Receives and buffers real-time sensor data streams from Physical Twin Entity via ROS2 topics."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEntity
]

instance ACCControllingFunctionalEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Implements Adaptive Cruise Control logic (ISO 15622) and offloads computation to external systems."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEntity
]

instance ReportingFunctionalEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Generates human-readable reports from timeseries data stored in SQL database."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEntity
]

instance DataTranslationFunctionalEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Serializes and translates data between Physical Twin and Digital Twin Entities using ROS2 message formats."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEntity
]

// C1: Components (User Entity)
instance ControlPanelComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Provides remote management interface for ACC control, speed adjustment, and emergency braking."
    base:isContainedIn UserEntity
]

instance ThreeDVisualizationComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Displays real-time 3D visualization of ego vehicle state, object tracks, and driving path."
    base:isContainedIn UserEntity
]

// C1: Environment
instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains MotorActuationComponent, SteeringServoActuationComponent, PointCloudClusteringAndTrackingComponent, DataPreProcessingComponent, ActuationFunctionalEntity
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains DataCollectionFunctionalEntity, ACCControllingFunctionalEntity, ReportingFunctionalEntity, DataTranslationFunctionalEntity
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains ControlPanelComponent, ThreeDVisualizationComponent
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The interactions from the virtual to physical world include:
  - **Desired speed commands**: Computed by the **ACC Controlling FE** (Digital Twin Entity) and sent back to the **Actuation FE** in the Physical Twin Entity, which converts them into motor voltage commands via the **Vedder ESC**.
  - **Remote management commands**: Enabled via the **Control Panel** (User Entity), including:
    - **Enable/Disable ACC**: Triggers state changes in the **Controlling FE**.
    - **Modify desired speed**: Directly adjusts the speed setpoint in the **ACC Controlling FE**.
    - **Emergency braking**: Overrides normal operation by sending a high-priority command to the **Actuation FE**.
  Commands are transmitted via **ROS2 topics** (within the vehicle) and **Wi-Fi** (between entities) with a **maximum end-to-end latency of 100 ms** (per 3GPP TS 22.185)."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale is **real-time** with the following constraints:
  - **Data collection and processing**: Sensor data (LiDAR, camera, vehicle state) is updated at the **perception cycle rate** (typically **10–30 Hz** for LiDAR and camera fusion).
  - **Control loop**: The **ACC Controlling FE** computes desired speed at a rate aligned with the **actuation cycle** (≤100 ms latency per 3GPP TS 22.185).
  - **Clock synchronization**: Devices must maintain **100 ms accuracy** for event ordering and coordination (limited by hardware constraints)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DTS follows an **ISO 23247-based reference architecture** with custom adaptations:
  - **Entities**:
    1. **Physical Twin Entity** (custom): Hosts **sensors**, **actuators**, and **pre-processing** (e.g., point cloud clustering).
    2. **Digital Twin Entity**: Hosts **data collection**, **control logic (ACC)**, and **reporting**.
    3. **User Entity**: Provides **visualization** and **remote control** interfaces.
  - **Functional Entities (FEs)**:
    - **Data Translation FE**: Handles serialization and unit conversion for all data streams.
    - **Controlling FE**: Implements ACC logic (ISO 15622 compliant).
    - **Presentation FE**: Pre-processes data for 3D visualization.
    - **Reporting FE**: Generates human-readable reports from raw data.
  - **Deployment**: Entities are distributed across hardware (e.g., **Jetson Orin Nano** for PT, cloud for Digital Twin Entity) with **ROS2** and **Wi-Fi** as communication backbones."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DTS covers the following lifecycle stages of the PT:
  - **Design/Development**: Used as a **cyber-physical experimentation facility** for ACC algorithm validation (e.g., ISO 15622 compliance for **Performance Class I ACC**).
  - **Operation**: Enables **real-time monitoring**, **remote management**, and **predictive maintenance** (e.g., brake system prognosis via integrated simulators like **CREO Simulate**).
  - **Lifecycle Management**: Supports **digital threads** for end-to-end information flow (e.g., data collection for post-operation analysis).
  The DT represents the PT **as operated**, with fidelity constrained by sensor accuracy (e.g., LiDAR/camera limitations) and computational offloading latency."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are addressed through:
  - **Sensor Accuracy**:
    - **LiDAR (Hokuyo UST-10LX)**: Provides high-resolution point clouds but may have **occlusion errors** in cluttered environments.
    - **Camera (Intel D435i)**: RGB-D fusion improves robustness but introduces **latency** (~30 Hz update rate).
  - **Model Validation**:
    - **ACC Algorithm**: Validated against **ISO 15622 Performance Class I** requirements.
    - **Actuation Model**: Tested for **real-time response** (≤100 ms latency).
  - **Uncertainty Handling**:
    - **Kalman Filtering**: Mitigates noise in object tracks.
    - **Clock Synchronization**: Ensures **100 ms accuracy** for distributed coordination (limited by hardware).
  - **Verification Mechanisms**:
    - **ROS2 Testing Framework**: Validates node interactions.
    - **Public Demonstration**: Provides empirical evidence of real-world performance (e.g., [YouTube demo](https://youtu.be/Rv-sJJQc3WU))."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical connection between PT and DT includes:
  - **Network Protocol**: **Wi-Fi** for inter-entity communication with **≤100 ms latency** (per 3GPP TS 22.185).
  - **Data Serialization**: **ROS2 message formats** (e.g., `sensor_msgs/PointCloud2`, `geometry_msgs/Twist`) for sensor data and commands.
  - **Clock Synchronization**: Devices synchronized to **100 ms accuracy** (hardware-constrained) for event ordering.
  - **Middleware**: **ROS2** enables modular communication between:
    - **Physical Twin Entity** (on-board sensors/actuators).
    - **Digital Twin Entity** (cloud/external server).
    - **User Entity** (remote UI)."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DTS is deployed across heterogeneous hardware:
  - **Physical Twin Entity**:
    - Hosted on the **Jetson Orin Nano** (on-board compute) and **Jetson NX antenna**.
    - Runs **ROS2 nodes** for sensor fusion (LiDAR/camera) and actuation.
  - **Digital Twin Entity**:
    - Deployed on an **external server/cloud** for computation offloading (e.g., ACC logic).
    - Uses **SQL database** for persistent storage of timeseries data.
  - **User Entity**:
    - Hosted on a **remote workstation** with **3D visualization** (e.g., Unity-like interface) and **Control Panel** (web-based or desktop app).
  - **Communication**: **Wi-Fi** links entities with **≤100 ms latency**; **ROS2 topics** handle intra-vehicle communication."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DTS adheres to the following standards:
  - **Architectural Standard**: **ISO 23247 Part 2** (Digital Twin Manufacturing Framework Reference Architecture), adapted for automotive use.
  - **ACC Standard**: **ISO 15622** (Performance Class I requirements for ACC).
  - **Communication Standards**:
    - **3GPP TS 22.185** (≤100 ms latency requirement for V2V communication).
    - **ROS2** (de facto standard for robotics middleware).
  - **Safety-Critical Considerations**:
    - **Clock synchronization** aligned with automotive-grade timing requirements (100 ms accuracy).
    - **Data integrity** ensured via **ROS2 message validation** and **SQL database transactions**."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety and security are addressed through:
    - **Real-time constraints**: **100 ms latency** and **clock synchronization** ensure timely and coordinated actions (e.g., emergency braking).
    - **ACC compliance**: Adherence to **ISO 15622** for safe operation of the ACC system.
    - **Remote management**: **Emergency braking commands** can be issued remotely, though the document does not specify **cybersecurity measures** (e.g., encryption, authentication) for Wi-Fi or ROS2 communication.
    The system assumes **hardware limitations** (e.g., 100 ms clock accuracy) and does not detail **fallback mechanisms** for network failures or sensor errors."
]
